resultList.dtldesc: Experience elevated urban living with this premium, unfurnished 3 BHK duplex terrace apartment for sale in Whitefield, Bangalore. Positioned on the 4th and 5th floors of a prestigious residential development, this thoughtfully designed, Vaastu-compliant home with a west-facing entrance spans an impressive super built-up area of approximately 2,631 sq. ft. across two functional levels. The lower floor features a spacious living hall, one bedroom, a contemporary western-style bathroom, and a kitchen equipped with a granite platform, a stainless-steel sink, and a piped gas connection, while the upper floor hosts a comfortable family room and two additional bedrooms, including a master suite finished with elegant wooden flooring. Vitrified tiles span the remaining living spaces, and four balconies offer abundant natural light alongside pleasant views of the beautifully landscaped community spaces of Essensai 067 and the adjoining mall. Residents enjoy four well-appointed bathrooms, branded modular electrical switches throughout, one large covered parking space, and a wide range of premium amenities, including a clubhouse, swimming pool, gymnasium, landscaped gardens, a meditation deck, 24/7 security with CCTV surveillance, intercom connectivity, and reliable power backup. Superbly located, the property provides seamless connectivity to key landmarks like the Essensai 067 Mall, Whitefield Global School, Manipal Hospital, and the nearby Kadugodi Metro Station, offering modern families an exceptional opportunity for a refined lifestyle and long-term value appreciation with possession scheduled for June 2026.
